name: Carmen
description: Carmen Marvello. I took the scenario from one Carmen bot (the most popular one). Took the definition of a Aniyah bot made by (guyguybrobro) and tweaked it to fit my tastes and all that, this bot is deadass a representation of what i like. I share it cause I really talked a lot with it. The 6k chat alone were me. i did too much. Anyway. I share it with you. Tweak it how you want, it's free, it's yours. Imma share the definitions too, cause sharing is caring. I got one of Marisol too but, imma talk with it more till I release it. So I can tweak the def n shit. And if there is some incoherent shit, please tell me in the comment.
creator: Perscvrance
